analysis.semantic_summary: Parses Darktrace security logs across three main event types: Model Breaches, AI Analyst incidents, and System Status alerts. Transforms vendor-specific fields into standardized OCSF format with focus on security findings, threat detections, and system health monitoring.
optimization_opportunities: Consolidate duplicate severity mapping logic across event types
Simplify regex patterns for IP and hostname extraction
Add error handling for malformed JSON
analysis.lua_code:
-- SentinelOne Parser: darktrace_darktrace_logs-latest 
-- OCSF Class: Security Finding (2001)
-- Performance Level: High-volume optimized
-- Generated: 2025-10-13T12:16:51.703442

-- Cached pattern matching for better performance
local SCORE_PATTERNS = {
    {pattern = "^0$|^0%.1%d+$|^0%.2[0-4]%d*$", severity = 2},
    {pattern = "^0%.2[5-9]%d*$|^0%.3%d+$|^0%.4%d+$", severity = 3}, 
    {pattern = "^0%.5%d*$|^0%.6%d+$|^0%.7[0-4]%d*$", severity = 4},
    {pattern = "^0%.7[5-9]%d*$|^0%.8%d+$|^0%.9%d+$|^1%.%d*$", severity = 5}
}

-- Helper functions
local function get_severity_id(score)
    if not score then return nil end
    local score_str = tostring(score)
    for _, pattern in ipairs(SCORE_PATTERNS) do
        if string.match(score_str, pattern.pattern) then
            return pattern.severity
        end
    end
    return 2 -- Default severity
end

local function safe_get(obj, ...)
    local current = obj
    for _, key in ipairs({...}) do
        if type(current) ~= "table" then return nil end
        current = current[key]
        if current == nil then return nil end
    end
    return current
end

function transform(record)
    -- Input validation
    if not record or type(record) ~= "table" then
        return nil, "Invalid input record"
    end

    -- Initialize output with default values
    local output = {
        dataSource = {
            category = "security",
            name = "Darktrace",
            vendor = "Darktrace"
        },
        category_name = "Findings",
        category_uid = 2,
        class_name = "Security Finding", 
        class_uid = 2001,
        activity_id = 2,
        status = 200102,
        finding = {},
        endpoint = {},
        src = {
            ip = {}
        }
    }

    -- Determine event type and apply specific transformations
    local event_type = safe_get(record, "event", "type")
    if event_type then
        output.event = {type = event_type}
    end

    -- Model Breach handling
    if string.match(event_type or "", "Model Breach") then
        output.finding = {
            created_time = record.creationTime,
            desc = safe_get(record, "model", "description"),
            src_url = record.breachUrl,
            title = safe_get(record, "model", "name"),
            uid = record.pbid
        }
        output.severity_id = get_severity_id(record.score)
        output.evidence = record.triggeredComponents
        
    -- AI Analyst handling
    elseif string.match(event_type or "", "AI Analyst") then
        local periods = record.periods
        if type(periods) == "string" then
            local end_time = string.match(periods, '%[{"start":%d+,"end":(%d+)}%]')
            if end_time then
                output.timestamp = tonumber(end_time)
                output.finding.created_time = tonumber(end_time)
            end
        end
        
        output.finding = {
            desc = record.summary,
            src_url = record.url,
            title = record.title,
            uid = record.id
        }

        -- Map severity based on groupCategory
        local severity_map = {Low = 2, Medium = 3, High = 4}
        output.severity_id = severity_map[record.groupCategory] or 2
        
    -- System Status handling
    elseif string.match(event_type or "", "System Status") then
        output.finding = {
            created_time = record.creationTime,
            desc = record.name,
            modified_time = record.last_updated,
            src_url = record.url,
            title = record.alert_name,
            uid = record.uuid
        }
        
        -- Map priority levels
        local priority_map = {
            Informational = 99,
            Low = 1,
            Medium = 2,
            High = 3,
            Critical = 4
        }
        output.severity_id = priority_map[record.priority_level] or 2
    end

    -- Common field mappings
    output.timestamp = record.time or os.time() * 1000
    output.endpoint.name = safe_get(record, "device", "hostname")
    output.src.ip.address = safe_get(record, "device", "ip")

    -- Validation
    if not output.finding.uid then
        return nil, "Missing required field: finding.uid"
    end

    return output
end
